#5 JDG WICK. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. COUNSEL FOR PLTF PRESENT, BOTH DEFTS PRESENT. A JUDGMENT PURS TO STIP READ INTO THE RECORD AND SIGNED BY BOTH DEFTS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INGRAM, RAEMON INGRAM, MICHELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET, #403, S.F., STAYED UNTIL AUG-03-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, FAILURE TO VACATE DEFTS TO PAY $1,862.50 BACKRENT PLUS $12.50 PER DAY FROM JUNE 15 TO AUG 3, 1993 PLUS $80.00 COSTS SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
